meta.title: Borderless Studio — NL↔PL Web Design Agency | Websites Without Borders
meta.desc: Web design agency from the Netherlands for Polish and Dutch businesses. Fast, multilingual websites. NL · PL · EN · DE. Based in Limburg, working worldwide.

hero.tag: NL ↔ PL · Web design without borders
hero.title: Web design agency from the Netherlands. For Polish and Dutch businesses.
hero.desc: We build fast, multilingual websites that connect markets. Dutch quality, Polish roots — launched in days, not weeks. NL · PL · EN · DE.
hero.secondary: Or scroll down — we've got more

websites.title: Websites
websites.desc: Lightning-fast, multilingual landing pages and business sites. Pure HTML/CSS — no bloated CMS. SEO-ready, GDPR-proof. Individual quote for every project.

marketing.title: Digital Marketing
marketing.desc: Google Business Profile, local SEO, social media setup. We make sure people actually find the beautiful site we built. Individual quote for every project.

automation.title: Automation
automation.desc: Custom scripts, cron jobs, data pipelines. If it's repetitive, we automate it. Individual quote for every project.

case1.title: SparkleWash
case1.desc: Full website design & development for a professional upholstery cleaning business. Multi-language (NL/DE/EN/PL), price calculator, before/after gallery, SEO, hosting, Google Maps integration. Launched in 3 days.

case2.title: Lief Schoon
case2.desc: Multi-language landing page for a cleaning business in Heerlen. Design, development, SEO, cookie consent, contact form, hosting. NL · EN · PL. Built in 2 days.

case3.title: Your Business Here
case3.desc: Got a business in the Netherlands or Poland? Let's build something that works across borders. Website, SEO, multi-language — we handle it all.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Every project is different. Let's talk.
pricing.note: No fixed packages. We scope your project and give you a fair quote. Always transparent, never a surprise.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.subtitle: No sales pitch. Just tell us what you need.
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Got it! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Try emailing us directly at hello@borderless.studio.

cookie.text: This site uses only functional cookies. No tracking, no ads.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: GDPR / AVG Statement
privacy.intro: Borderless Studio values your privacy. Here's how we handle your data.

what.title: What we collect
what.desc: Through our contact form: name, email, and your message. That's it.

purpose.title: Why we collect it
purpose.desc: Solely to respond to your inquiry. Your data is never used for marketing without consent.

sharing.title: Third parties
sharing.desc: None. Your data stays with us. No selling, no sharing, no renting.

storage.title: Storage
storage.desc: Your message is stored in our business mailbox and deleted when no longer needed.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.desc: View, modify, or delete your data anytime. Email hello@borderless.studio — we reply within 30 days.
